anchor.null_project_code: Project Code is required and cannot be empty (Row {row})
anchor.null_facility_code: Facility Code is required and cannot be empty (Row {row})
anchor.null_document_type: Document Type is required and cannot be empty (Row {row})
anchor.null_discipline: Discipline is required and cannot be empty (Row {row})
anchor.invalid_session_format: Session ID '{value}' must be exactly 6 digits (e.g., 001234)
anchor.invalid_date_format: Date '{value}' cannot be parsed. Expected format: YYYY-MM-DD (Row {row})

identity.id_uncertain: Document ID could not be determined from available data (Row {row}). Required: Project_Code, Document_Type, Document_Sequence_Number
identity.rev_missing: Document Revision is missing for Document ID '{document_id}' (Row {row})
identity.duplicate_trans: Duplicate Transmittal Number '{value}' detected in session '{session}' (Rows {rows})
identity.duplicate_doc_id: Duplicate Document ID '{value}' found in submission (Rows {rows})

logic.date_inversion: Date inversion: Review Return Date ({return_date}) is before Submission Date ({submission_date}) for Document '{document_id}'
logic.rev_regression: Revision regression detected: Current revision '{current_rev}' appears older than previous '{previous_rev}' for Document '{document_id}'
logic.status_conflict: Status conflict: Submission marked as closed but Review Status indicates active review for Document '{document_id}'
logic.overdue_pending: Resubmission is overdue. Expected by {expected_date}, current date is {current_date} for Document '{document_id}'
logic.submission_after_closure: Submission date {submission_date} is after closure date {closure_date} for Document '{document_id}'

fill.limit_exceeded: Forward fill limit exceeded: Filled {filled_rows} rows (max allowed: {max_rows}) for column '{column}' in group '{group}'
fill.multi_level_fail: Multi-level forward fill failed: Could not find valid value within Document_ID '{document_id}' for column '{column}'
fill.default_applied: Default value '{default_value}' applied for null column '{column}' (Row {row}). Original value was null.
fill.boundary_cross: Forward fill crossed session boundary: Cannot fill across Submission_Session '{from_session}' to '{to_session}' for column '{column}'

validation.pattern_mismatch: Field '{column}' value '{value}' does not match expected pattern '{pattern}' (Row {row})
validation.invalid_enum: Field '{column}' value '{value}' is not in allowed values: {allowed_values} (Row {row})
validation.type_mismatch: Field '{column}' expected type '{expected_type}' but got '{actual_type}' with value '{value}' (Row {row})
validation.required_missing: Required field '{column}' is missing (null or empty) (Row {row})
validation.foreign_key_fail: Foreign key reference failed: '{column}' value '{value}' not found in reference table (Row {row})

calculation.dependency_fail: Calculation failed for '{target_column}': Missing required input column(s): {missing_columns} (Row {row})
calculation.circular_dependency: Circular dependency detected in calculation graph involving columns: {columns}
calculation.division_by_zero: Division by zero occurred in calculation for column '{column}' (Row {row})
calculation.aggregate_empty: Aggregation produced empty result for '{column}': No data matched filter criteria (Row {row})
calculation.mapping_no_match: Mapping failed for column '{column}': Value '{value}' matched no mapping rules (Row {row})

mapping.no_columns_detected: No columns could be mapped from input file. Headers do not match schema.
mapping.partial_mapping: Partial mapping achieved: {mapped_count}/{total_count} columns recognized. Unmapped: {unmapped_columns}
mapping.header_mismatch: Expected header '{expected}' but found '{actual}' at column position {position}
mapping.ambiguous_mapping: Ambiguous mapping: Input column '{input_column}' could match multiple schema columns: {possible_matches}

initiation.file_not_found: Input file not found at path: {file_path}
initiation.invalid_format: File format '{format}' is not supported. Supported formats: {supported_formats}
initiation.encoding_error: File encoding error: Could not decode as {encoding}. Try UTF-8 or Latin-1.
initiation.permission_denied: Permission denied: Cannot read file at {file_path}

historical.cross_session_duplicate: Document ID '{document_id}' already exists in historical session {session_id} (submitted on {submission_date})
historical.revision_regression: Document '{document_id}' revision regression: Current '{current_rev}' is less than historical '{historical_rev}'
historical.temporal_inconsistency: Temporal inconsistency: Session {current_session} date {current_date} is before historical session {historical_session} date {historical_date}

template.signature_invalid: Template signature validation failed. File may be corrupted or tampered.
template.config_incompatible: Configuration incompatible: Schema requires version {min_schema_version}, current config is {config_version}

error_codes.P1-A-P-0101: Anchor column is null or empty
error_codes.P2-I-V-0204: Document_ID has invalid format or composite mismatch
error_codes.L3-L-V-0303: Review_Status contains REJ but Resubmission_Required is not YES/RESUBMITTED
error_codes.L3-L-V-0304: Resubmission_Plan_Date is past but Resubmission_Overdue_Status is not overdue/resubmitted
error_codes.L3-L-V-0305: Current revision appears older than previous revision for same Document_ID
error_codes.L3-L-V-0306: Revision gap detected in Submission_Session sequence
error_codes.S1-I-F-0805: Unsupported file format or file too large
error_codes.S1-I-V-0502: Required columns are missing from input
error_codes.V5-I-V-0501: Field value does not match expected pattern
error_codes.V5-I-V-0502: Field value length violates min/max constraints
error_codes.V5-I-V-0503: Field value is not in allowed values list
error_codes.V5-I-V-0504: Field value type does not match expected type

action.fix_in_excel: Fix this issue in the Excel source file and re-upload
action.verify_headers: Verify column headers match expected schema. Check for typos or extra spaces.
action.convert_format: Convert file to supported format (.xlsx or .csv) and retry
action.check_dependencies: Ensure all required input columns have values before this calculation runs
action.review_null_handling: Review null handling configuration. Consider adjusting fill limits or default values.
action.review_source: Review source data. Null values may indicate missing data in upstream systems.
action.truncate_or_fix: Either truncate the value to fit or correct the source data
action.verify_reference: Verify the referenced value exists in the lookup table or master data
action.review_priority: Review if this overdue item should be escalated or given priority handling
action.review_mapping: Review column mapping configuration. Some columns may need manual mapping.
action.verify_history: Verify document revision history. This may be a legitimate rollback.
action.check_formula: Review the calculation formula for potential division by zero or invalid operations
action.check_filter_criteria: Review filter criteria for aggregation. Ensure data exists for the specified conditions
